description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a single story with a flat, slightly sloped roof and a prominent chimney. The exterior is clad in a combination of wood and concrete, giving it a contemporary appearance. Large windows are present on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property is landscaped with several mature trees and grass lawns, providing a suburban residential feel. The front entrance is slightly recessed, and there is no visible porch or veranda.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat sloped roof, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: The front and left side of the bungalow are visible, showing the main entrance, driveway, and two large trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: The left side and partial front of the bungalow are shown, highlighting the driveway, side windows, and a tree near the left boundary.
description_view_2: The rear and right side of the bungalow are visible, with the back lawn and a tree near the right edge of the property.
description_view_3: The back and left side of the bungalow are shown, with the rear lawn and two trees framing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
